textByHashes.d06c46dd23f648ccab4b84b7569612a1bf80ac59: Yes, douse the flames with water... pure water...
textByHashes.ac2235c4e5a366b1702f23147f2ddc2be798d913: ...from the sacred pool, in the lands above... hurry and release me...
textByHashes.fbcb1a2cf7db9271af282bc7df4cd3d9055ec462: Hurry, Vacu, the heat of these flames is killing me... ha ha ha!
textByHashes.f2c704b619d77231454f86ceb6afac4860008480: Bring me pure water! Douse the flames, lest ye -
textByHashes.f3cedb157b79d5862b07a65312a067183897d88b: Foolish Vacu... now thou shalt be my pawn.
textByHashes.1784f2e9d783b3af2bd556d3e9ae9393ee3cc6e2: Iles Resti Yam Darkus Spiritus Possesi Yanai...
textByHashes.70835a4cb10aeb2a415d907dbc1f5a890482067a: Ha ha ha ha! Die, Vacu!
textByHashes.fb502205f4f6a3ad9adabdfca7057b7e641a1dfc: Foolish Vacu... come for me again and thou shalt taste more of my power!
textByHashes.35260cfead3c8668b2dd1bc9fe2c511ff0c9593e: Vile serpent, thou wilt pay for that!
textByHashes.2bf43674b59a49eb15c5118051e3765c490b2caf: Curse you... foul intruder... wretched Vacu! Thy meddling ways hath brought thee to thy doom!
